title: Define Environment Variable Values Using An Init Container — Unsupported forms
text:
Unquoted values are
prohibited
:
VAR=value
— not supported.
Double-quoted values are
prohibited
:
VAR="value"
— not supported.
Multiple adjacent quoted strings are
not
supported:
VAR='val1''val2'
— not supported.
Any form of interpolation, expansion, or concatenation is
not
supported:
VAR='a'$OTHER
or
VAR=${OTHER}
— not supported.
VAR=value
— not supported.
VAR="value"
— not supported.
VAR='val1''val2'
— not supported.
VAR='a'$OTHER
or
VAR=${OTHER}
— not supported.
The strict single-quote requirement ensures the value is taken literally by the kubelet when loading environment variables from files.
